Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It's so simple... You just purchase a ticket at the window, and then walk in to enjoy a film...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}This may sound silly to you, but I've always wanted to try the whole theater experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Even though we sat at the end of the aisle, I didn't feel that my view was compromised in the least...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It seems a lot of thought goes into the design and construction of a movie theater.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}H-Hey now. This was my first time having the freedom to choose my own seat—I'm simply impressed by the options.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 13 4 15 5}It's thanks to you, {f 4 1}. I've never felt comfortable enough to come here alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I'm sure most people don't consider this to be such a big deal...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I imagine someone like Yukari would have no reservations seeing a movie by herself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}She's likely more suited to riding a motorcycle than I am, as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 13 4 15 5}Yes, you must have seen it when I rode in to provide support for the team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}However... that wasn't my original motivation for getting it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}With a motorcycle, I can go where I want, when I want, all on my own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You could say it's my modest attempt at rebellion against the many restrictions of my life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}After it was damaged, I considered letting go... But ultimately, I decided to have it repaired instead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I don't regret it. Even now, I spend my time tuning it whenever I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It's just that my time available for riding is limited.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Lately, I find myself dreaming about driving to some far-off destination without telling a soul...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Well, fantasizing can be fun in its own way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 13 4 5 5}It sounds strange, doesn't it? Well, maybe it is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Everyone is against me riding it. They think it's too dangerous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Even so, I'm quite fond of it. Maybe you should give it a try yourself, if you're so inclined.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Can you ride one on your own? Or do you plan to cling on behind me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}{f 5 13 4 15 5}Heh... Whichever it is, you've got your work cut out for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}In any case, you have my thanks. I'm feeling a lot better now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru is expressing her appreciation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що наші стосунки зміцнились...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}When my parents went through stressful times, maybe they had moments like this too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Sorry, I know this isn't the proper place to stand around chatting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}But if it's all right with you... why don't we stay here a bit longer before heading back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I passed some time with Mitsuru,[n]then headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
